sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8142" key="a)ne/kqutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέκ-θῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8142.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not to be removed by sacrifice,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μιάσματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (codd. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνέκπλυτα</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
